# Glossary

> **Scope**: Domain terminology used by the plugin monolith framework.
> **Confidence**: Low
> **Last updated**: 2026-05-16
> **Source entries**: OBS-000

| Term | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Plugin Contract | Interface definition that extension packages implement |
| Composition Root | Startup boundary where dependencies are wired |
| Bounded Module | Internal capability area with explicit boundaries |
| Adapter | Infrastructure implementation behind a stable abstraction |
